<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>All your tools. One basket. · Gumloop</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Caveat:wght@600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<style>
:root{
  --foreground:#1f2430;
  --muted-foreground:#6b7280;
  --card:#ffffff;
  --border:#ece5d8;
  --cream:#faf6ee;
  --cream-2:#f4ecdd;
  --pink-400:#f65fb3;
  --pink-500:#ef3d9e;
  --gingham:#c8442e;
  --gingham-soft:#e4b7ad;
  --radius:16px;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;}
html,body{margin:0;padding:0;overflow-x:hidden;}
body{
  background:var(--cream);
  color:var(--foreground);
  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  line-height:1.5;
}
.page{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:26px 20px 60px;}

/* header */
.site-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:26px;}
.brand-mark{color:var(--foreground);flex:none;}
.eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted-foreground);
  background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);padding:5px 11px;border-radius:999px;}
.eyebrow .dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gingham);}

/* hero */
.hero{text-align:center;position:relative;padding:14px 0 8px;}
.hero::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-40px -60px 40px;z-index:0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(200,68,46,.05) 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, rgba(200,68,46,.05) 75%),
    linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(200,68,46,.05) 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, rgba(200,68,46,.05) 75%);
  background-size:34px 34px;background-position:0 0,17px 17px;
  -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 35%,#000 0%,transparent 75%);
          mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 35%,#000 0%,transparent 75%);
  pointer-events:none;}
.hero>*{position:relative;z-index:1;}
.hero-title{line-height:1.04;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin:6px 0 0;}
.hero-greet{display:block;font-size:clamp(20px,3.6vw,30px);font-weight:600;color:var(--muted-foreground);letter-spacing:-.01em;margin-bottom:2px;}
.hero-line2{display:block;white-space:nowrap;font-size:clamp(19px,4.9vw,46px);line-height:1.02;letter-spacing:-.03em;}
.hl-pink{color:var(--gingham);}
.hero-sub{max-width:560px;margin:16px auto 0;font-size:15px;color:var(--muted-foreground);}

/* top info box (compact, always visible) */
.claim-panel{width:100%;max-width:430px;margin:22px auto 0;}
.claim-panel .form-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:14px;}
.claim-panel .form-card{padding:18px;gap:12px;}
.claim-panel .section-title{font-size:clamp(19px,3vw,23px);margin:0 0 2px;}

/* scroll prompt */
.scroll-prompt{display:inline-flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;margin:26px auto 4px;
  background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted-foreground);font:inherit;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
.scroll-prompt:hover{color:var(--gingham);}
.scroll-prompt i{width:20px;height:20px;color:var(--gingham);animation:bobY 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes bobY{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(4px);}}

/* story intro */
.story-intro{text-align:center;margin-top:30px;}
.basket-annotate{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0;max-width:420px;margin:0 auto;}
.handwrite{font-family:'Caveat','Segoe Script',cursive;font-weight:700;font-size:clamp(23px,4.6vw,34px);
  line-height:1.02;color:var(--gingham);transform:rotate(-3deg);margin:0 0 2px;max-width:340px;}
.curly-arrow{width:62px;height:62px;color:var(--gingham);transform:rotate(-4deg);}
.story-intro .basket-stage{margin:0 auto;}

/* basket */
.basket-stage{position:relative;width:min(420px,86vw);aspect-ratio:1/1;margin:14px auto 0;cursor:pointer;
  outline:none;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
.basket-img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;
  transition:opacity .55s ease, transform .55s ease;}
.basket-open{opacity:0;transform:scale(.965);}
.basket-stage.is-open .basket-closed{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.03);}
.basket-stage.is-open .basket-open{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}
.basket-stage:not(.is-open):hover .basket-closed{transform:translateY(-6px) rotate(-.6deg);}
.open-hint{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:-6px;transform:translateX(-50%);
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;
  background:var(--gingham);padding:8px 15px;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(200,68,46,.28);
  transition:opacity .3s ease;animation:bob 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
.open-hint i{width:15px;height:15px;}
.basket-stage.is-open .open-hint{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;animation:none;}
@keyframes bob{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-5px);}}

/* reveal sections */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:opacity .6s ease,transform .6s ease;
  pointer-events:none;margin-top:46px;}
.reveal.shown{opacity:1;transform:none;pointer-events:auto;}

/* section head */
.section-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.num-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:30px;height:30px;flex:none;
  border-radius:9px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;color:var(--gingham);}
.section-title{font-size:clamp(20px,3.4vw,26px);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin:0;}
.section-note{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin:0 0 20px;padding-left:42px;max-width:640px;}

/* orbit */
.orbit{position:relative;width:min(560px,94vw);aspect-ratio:1/1;margin:8px auto 0;}
.orbit-lines{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;}
.orbit-lines line{stroke:var(--gingham-soft);stroke-width:.4;opacity:.55;transition:stroke .2s ease,opacity .2s ease;}
.orbit-lines line.on{stroke:var(--gingham);opacity:1;}
.orbit-center{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  width:clamp(72px,20%,106px);aspect-ratio:1/1;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--foreground);
  box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(31,36,48,.12);z-index:3;}
.orbit-center::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-9px;border-radius:50%;border:1px dashed var(--gingham-soft);opacity:.55;}
.g-mark{width:46%;height:46%;}
.orbit-tile{position:absolute;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:clamp(46px,13.5%,70px);aspect-ratio:1/1;
  border-radius:50%;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  cursor:pointer;z-index:2;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(31,36,48,.07);
  transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease,border-color .18s ease;}
.orbit-tile img{width:56%;height:56%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
.orbit-tile.pulse-ring{animation:ringpulse 2.6s ease-in-out infinite;}
.orbit-tile.pulse-ring:hover,.orbit-tile.pulse-ring:focus-visible{animation:none;}
@keyframes ringpulse{
  0%,100%{box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(31,36,48,.07),0 0 0 0 rgba(200,68,46,0);border-color:var(--border);}
  50%{box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(31,36,48,.07),0 0 0 5px rgba(200,68,46,.22);border-color:var(--gingham);}
}
.orbit-tile:hover,.orbit-tile:focus-visible{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.13);border-color:var(--gingham);
  box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(200,68,46,.22);z-index:4;outline:none;}
.tt-label{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 3px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--muted-foreground);white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s ease;pointer-events:none;}
.orbit-tile:hover .tt-label,.orbit-tile:focus-visible .tt-label{opacity:1;}
.orbit-hint{text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin:16px 0 0;}
.more-wrap{text-align:center;margin-top:20px;}
.more-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--gingham);text-decoration:none;}
.more-link i{width:14px;height:14px;}
.more-link.big{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;gap:8px;}
.more-link.big i{width:18px;height:18px;}
.more-link.big:hover{text-decoration:underline;}

/* card */
.card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(31,36,48,.04);}
.how-card{padding:24px;}
.how-copy{font-size:15px;color:var(--foreground);margin:0 0 20px;}
.how-flow{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
@media(min-width:680px){.how-flow{flex-direction:row;align-items:center;gap:8px;}}
.flow-step{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;background:var(--cream-2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;flex:1;}
.flow-num{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:26px;height:26px;flex:none;
  border-radius:50%;background:var(--gingham);color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;}
.flow-t{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;}
.flow-d{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted-foreground);}
.flow-arrow{width:18px;height:18px;color:var(--muted-foreground);flex:none;align-self:center;transform:rotate(90deg);}
@media(min-width:680px){.flow-arrow{transform:none;}}

/* form */
.form-wrap{display:grid;gap:22px;}
@media(min-width:720px){.form-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr 1.05fr;align-items:center;gap:34px;}}
.form-card{padding:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
.field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--foreground);}
.field input,.field textarea{width:100%;font:inherit;font-weight:400;font-size:14px;color:var(--foreground);
  background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:11px 13px;resize:vertical;
  transition:border-color .15s ease,box-shadow .15s ease;}
.field input:focus,.field textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gingham);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(200,68,46,.12);}
.cta-card{align-items:center;text-align:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;padding:30px 22px;}
.cta-icon{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--cream-2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--gingham);}
.cta-icon i{width:24px;height:24px;}
.cta-lead{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin:0;max-width:320px;}
.cta-fine{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin:0;}
.cta-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-decoration:none;
  border:1px solid var(--pink-500);border-radius:11px;cursor:pointer;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--pink-400),var(--pink-500));color:#fff;font:inherit;
  font-size:16px;font-weight:600;padding:14px 30px;box-shadow:inset 0 1.5px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.28),0 4px 14px rgba(239,61,158,.28);
  transition:transform .15s ease,filter .15s ease;}
.cta-btn:hover{filter:brightness(1.04);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.cta-btn:disabled{opacity:.7;cursor:default;transform:none;}
.form-status{font-size:13px;margin:2px 0 0;min-height:18px;}
.form-status.ok{color:#15803d;font-weight:600;}
.form-status.err{color:#b91c1c;font-weight:600;}
.form-done{text-align:center;padding:26px 10px;}
.form-done i{width:40px;height:40px;color:#15803d;}
.form-done h3{margin:12px 0 4px;font-size:18px;}
.form-done p{margin:0;font-size:14px;color:var(--muted-foreground);}

/* proof */
.proof{margin-top:52px;padding-top:26px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center;}
.proof-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:14px;}
.proof-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;}
.proof-item img{height:20px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;opacity:.85;}
.proof-v{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;}
.proof-l{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted-foreground);}
.proof-note{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin-top:14px;}

/* modal */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(31,36,48,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(3px);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:18px;z-index:50;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .22s ease;}
.modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;}
.modal{background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;width:min(520px,100%);
  max-height:86vh;overflow:auto;transform:translateY(14px) scale(.98);transition:transform .22s ease;position:relative;}
.modal-overlay.open .modal{transform:none;}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);
  background:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--muted-foreground);}
.modal-close i{width:16px;height:16px;}
.modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;padding:22px 22px 6px;}
.modal-head img{width:40px;height:40px;object-fit:contain;}
.modal-head .mh-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;}
.modal-head .mh-sub{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted-foreground);}
.modal-body{padding:12px 22px 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
.uc-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px;}
.uc-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.uc-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;}
.uc-tag{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gingham);background:rgba(200,68,46,.09);
  border-radius:999px;padding:3px 9px;white-space:nowrap;}
.uc-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin:0 0 12px;}
.uc-uses{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.uc-uses .lbl{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted-foreground);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;}
.uc-uses img{width:22px;height:22px;object-fit:contain;}
.uc-out{background:var(--cream-2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-size:13px;}
.uc-out .out-lbl{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted-foreground);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-bottom:8px;}
.out-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px dashed var(--border);}
.out-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.out-row .k{color:var(--muted-foreground);}
.out-row .v{font-weight:600;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;}
.out-row .v.ok{color:#15803d;} .out-row .v.err{color:#b91c1c;} .out-row .v.warn{color:#b45309;}
.out-stat{font-size:26px;font-weight:700;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;}
.out-quote{font-size:13px;font-style:italic;padding:6px 0;border-left:2px solid var(--gingham-soft);padding-left:11px;margin:6px 0;}
.out-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--pink-400),var(--pink-500));
  color:#fff;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:9px;}
.out-qa .q{font-weight:600;} .out-qa .a{color:var(--muted-foreground);margin-top:4px;}
.out-note{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gingham);}
.out-note i{width:15px;height:15px;}

.uc-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:12px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--gingham);text-decoration:none;}
.uc-link i{width:14px;height:14px;}
.uc-tag.tpl{color:var(--blue-700,#3b6fd4);background:rgba(59,111,212,.10);}
.uc-tag.ex{color:#7a6a2f;background:rgba(180,140,30,.12);}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark){
  body{background:#17130e;color:#f1ece3;}
  :root{--foreground:#f1ece3;--muted-foreground:#a89f92;--card:#211b14;--border:#382e22;--cream:#1c1710;--cream-2:#241d15;}
  .eyebrow,.num-chip,.tool-tile,.proof-item,.modal-close,.uc-card{background:#211b14;}
  .flow-step,.uc-out{background:#241d15;}
  .modal{background:#1c1710;}
}

</style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="page">

    <!-- HEADER -->
    <header class="site-head">
      <svg class="brand-mark" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 1000" width="26" height="26" aria-label="Gumloop">
        <path fill="currentColor" d="M500.011,802.58c-11.613,0-23.323-.661-34.804-1.966-34.599-3.966-67.94-13.79-99.089-29.199-25.292-12.507-48.708-28.481-69.597-47.477-7.08-6.44-13.972-13.323-20.482-20.461-19.03-20.944-34.996-44.36-47.453-69.59-15.41-31.154-25.234-64.493-29.199-99.096-1.306-11.499-1.966-23.209-1.966-34.801s.661-23.323,1.966-34.804c3.995-34.658,13.819-67.997,29.199-99.089,12.481-25.242,28.449-48.651,47.458-69.577,6.518-7.143,13.409-14.027,20.477-20.454,20.889-18.997,44.304-34.972,69.597-47.477,31.15-15.411,64.489-25.235,99.092-29.201,11.477-1.306,23.188-1.966,34.801-1.966h302.569v93.523h-302.569c-12.04,0-24.068,1.03-35.752,3.064-37.684,6.479-72.893,23.271-101.814,48.555-7.032,6.149-13.713,12.831-19.862,19.862-25.304,28.942-42.102,64.152-48.578,101.821-2.032,11.68-3.062,23.708-3.062,35.745s1.03,24.065,3.062,35.752c6.479,37.684,23.271,72.893,48.556,101.816,6.17,7.029,12.857,13.717,19.878,19.876,28.926,25.291,64.135,42.082,101.826,48.561,11.67,2.032,23.699,3.062,35.745,3.062s24.054-1.03,35.73-3.062c37.658-6.455,72.867-23.245,101.814-48.556,7.026-6.165,13.713-12.852,19.878-19.876,25.289-28.926,42.081-64.135,48.56-101.827,2.033-11.677,3.064-23.705,3.064-35.745v-38.514h-206.97c-21.224,0-38.493,17.277-38.493,38.514s17.269,38.514,38.493,38.514h124.224c-13.189,43.346-48.084,77.251-92.005,89.03-11.089,2.982-22.626,4.495-34.295,4.495-11.608,0-23.153-1.519-34.316-4.516-45.335-12.159-81.049-47.874-93.206-93.206-2.997-11.157-4.516-22.702-4.516-34.317s1.519-23.16,4.516-34.316c12.157-45.335,47.871-81.049,93.204-93.206,11.157-2.997,22.702-4.516,34.317-4.516h302.569v132.037c0,11.592-.661,23.303-1.966,34.804-3.966,34.601-13.79,67.94-29.201,99.091-12.455,25.231-28.421,48.646-47.456,69.597-6.582,7.215-13.472,14.107-20.477,20.477-20.951,19.035-44.366,35.001-69.595,47.456-31.151,15.41-64.492,25.234-99.094,29.199-11.478,1.306-23.181,1.966-34.78,1.966Z"/>
      </svg>
    </header>

    <!-- HERO -->
    <section class="hero">
      <h1 class="hero-title"><span class="hero-greet">Hi Dima,</span><span class="hero-line2">We want to send you a <span class="hl-pink">picnic basket</span></span></h1>

      <div class="claim-panel" id="claimPanel">
        <div class="form-wrap">
          <div class="form-copy">
            <h2 class="section-title">Drop your details here</h2>
          </div>
          <form class="card form-card" id="basketForm" novalidate>
          <label class="field"><span>Name</span><input name="name" type="text" autocomplete="name" required/></label>
          <label class="field"><span>Company email</span><input name="email" type="email" autocomplete="email" required/></label>
          <label class="field"><span>Shipping address</span><textarea name="address" rows="3" autocomplete="street-address" required></textarea></label>
          <button type="submit" class="cta-btn" id="submitBtn"><span class="btn-label">Send me a basket</span></button>
          <p class="form-status" id="formStatus"></p>
        </form>
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="scroll-prompt" id="scrollPrompt" type="button">
        <span>Scroll down</span>
        <i data-lucide="chevron-down"></i>
      </button>
    </section>

    <!-- STORY INTRO -->
    <section class="story-intro" id="story">
            <div class="basket-annotate">
        <p class="handwrite">this is how Gumloop helps you keep your tools in one basket</p>
        <svg class="curly-arrow" viewBox="0 0 120 116" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M20,16 C95,18 62,74 62,104" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          <path d="M51,91 L62,105 L73,91" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="basket-stage" id="basketStage" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="Open the picnic basket">
        <img class="basket-img basket-closed" id="imgClosed" alt="Closed picnic basket"/>
        <img class="basket-img basket-open" id="imgOpen" alt="Open picnic basket"/>
        <div class="open-hint" id="openHint"><i data-lucide="mouse-pointer-click"></i> Click to open</div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- TOOLS REVEAL -->
    <section class="reveal" id="toolsSection">
      <div class="section-head">
        <span class="num-chip">01</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Everything Gumloop packs for you</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="section-note">Your whole stack connects to Gumloop. Tap any tool to see what your team can build with it.</p>
      <div class="orbit" id="orbit">
        <svg class="orbit-lines" id="orbitLines" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true"></svg>
        <div class="orbit-center" id="orbitCenter" aria-label="Gumloop">
          <svg class="g-mark" viewBox="0 0 1000 1000" width="44" height="44" aria-hidden="true">
            <path fill="currentColor" d="M500.011,802.58c-11.613,0-23.323-.661-34.804-1.966-34.599-3.966-67.94-13.79-99.089-29.199-25.292-12.507-48.708-28.481-69.597-47.477-7.08-6.44-13.972-13.323-20.482-20.461-19.03-20.944-34.996-44.36-47.453-69.59-15.41-31.154-25.234-64.493-29.199-99.096-1.306-11.499-1.966-23.209-1.966-34.801s.661-23.323,1.966-34.804c3.995-34.658,13.819-67.997,29.199-99.089,12.481-25.242,28.449-48.651,47.458-69.577,6.518-7.143,13.409-14.027,20.477-20.454,20.889-18.997,44.304-34.972,69.597-47.477,31.15-15.411,64.489-25.235,99.092-29.201,11.477-1.306,23.188-1.966,34.801-1.966h302.569v93.523h-302.569c-12.04,0-24.068,1.03-35.752,3.064-37.684,6.479-72.893,23.271-101.814,48.555-7.032,6.149-13.713,12.831-19.862,19.862-25.304,28.942-42.102,64.152-48.578,101.821-2.032,11.68-3.062,23.708-3.062,35.745s1.03,24.065,3.062,35.752c6.479,37.684,23.271,72.893,48.556,101.816,6.17,7.029,12.857,13.717,19.878,19.876,28.926,25.291,64.135,42.082,101.826,48.561,11.67,2.032,23.699,3.062,35.745,3.062s24.054-1.03,35.73-3.062c37.658-6.455,72.867-23.245,101.814-48.556,7.026-6.165,13.713-12.852,19.878-19.876,25.289-28.926,42.081-64.135,48.56-101.827,2.033-11.677,3.064-23.705,3.064-35.745v-38.514h-206.97c-21.224,0-38.493,17.277-38.493,38.514s17.269,38.514,38.493,38.514h124.224c-13.189,43.346-48.084,77.251-92.005,89.03-11.089,2.982-22.626,4.495-34.295,4.495-11.608,0-23.153-1.519-34.316-4.516-45.335-12.159-81.049-47.874-93.206-93.206-2.997-11.157-4.516-22.702-4.516-34.317s1.519-23.16,4.516-34.316c12.157-45.335,47.871-81.049,93.204-93.206,11.157-2.997,22.702-4.516,34.317-4.516h302.569v132.037c0,11.592-.661,23.303-1.966,34.804-3.966,34.601-13.79,67.94-29.201,99.091-12.455,25.231-28.421,48.646-47.456,69.597-6.582,7.215-13.472,14.107-20.477,20.477-20.951,19.035-44.366,35.001-69.595,47.456-31.151,15.41-64.492,25.234-99.094,29.199-11.478,1.306-23.181,1.966-34.78,1.966Z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="orbit-hint">Tap a tool to see three things your team can build with it.</p>
      <div class="more-wrap"><a class="more-link big" href="https://www.gumloop.com/mcp" target="_blank" rel="noopener">And 200+ others <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right"></i></a></div>
    </section>

    <!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
    <section class="reveal" id="howSection">
      <div class="section-head">
        <span class="num-chip">02</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">How Gumloop works</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="card how-card">
        <p class="how-copy">Gumloop is a platform for building AI agents that do real work end to end. You describe the job in plain language. An agent runs it across the same stack your org already runs, the exact tools sitting in your basket above.</p>
        <div class="how-flow">
          <div class="flow-step"><span class="flow-num">1</span><div><div class="flow-t">Describe the job</div><div class="flow-d">Plain language, no engineering.</div></div></div>
          <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="flow-arrow"></i>
          <div class="flow-step"><span class="flow-num">2</span><div><div class="flow-t">Agent runs it</div><div class="flow-d">Across your connected tools.</div></div></div>
          <i data-lucide="arrow-right" class="flow-arrow"></i>
          <div class="flow-step"><span class="flow-num">3</span><div><div class="flow-t">Save it as a skill</div><div class="flow-d">Share it with the whole team.</div></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>



    <!-- PROOF -->
    <footer class="proof">
      <div class="proof-row" id="proofRow"></div>
    </footer>

  </div>

  <!-- MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="modalOverlay" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal" id="modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
      <button class="modal-close" id="modalClose" aria-label="Close"><i data-lucide="x"></i></button>
      <div class="modal-head" id="modalHead"></div>
      <div class="modal-body" id="modalBody"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
window.PICNIC = {"logos": {"Salesforce": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "HubSpot": "data:image/png;base64,", "Apollo": "data:image/png;base64,", "Gmail": "data:image/png;base64,", "Slack": "data:image/png;base64,", "Gong": "data:image/png;base64,", "LinkedIn": "data:image/png;base64,", "Perplexity": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "Semrush": "data:image/png;base64,", "Shopify": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "Reddit": "data:image/png;base64,", "Firecrawl": "data:image/png;base64,", "Instacart": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "Gusto": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "Samsara": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,"}, "closed": "data:image/webp;base64,", "open": "data:image/webp;base64,", "usecases": {"personalized_lp": {"title": "Personalized landing page", "tag": "Sales & GTM", "desc": "Researches a prospect and builds a branded one-pager to send.", "uses": ["LinkedIn", "Apollo"], "output": {"type": "cta", "label": "Book a demo"}}, "crm_updater": {"title": "Post-call CRM updater", "tag": "Sales & GTM", "desc": "Listens to each call and updates the opportunity automatically.", "uses": ["Gong", "Salesforce"], "output": {"type": "rows", "rows": [["Stage", "Negotiation"], ["Next step", "Send MSA"], ["Close date", "Updated"]]}}, "quote_digest": {"title": "Daily call-quote digest", "tag": "Sales & GTM", "desc": "Pulls the best quotes from every call and emails the whole team each morning.", "uses": ["Gong", "Gmail"], "output": {"type": "quotes", "to": "GTM team", "quotes": ["If you can solve sharing, we'd roll this out tomorrow.", "Adoption is 80% of the problem, not building."]}}, "seo_decay": {"title": "SEO decay tracker", "tag": "Marketing", "desc": "Flags pages losing rankings and traffic before they tank.", "uses": ["Semrush", "Shopify"], "output": {"type": "rows", "rows": [["/collections/sale", "-24%"], ["/blog/gift-guide", "-17%"], ["/products/tee", "-9%"]]}}, "aeo_agent": {"title": "AEO keyword agent", "tag": "Marketing", "desc": "Shows how often your brand shows up in AI search answers.", "uses": ["Semrush", "Perplexity"], "output": {"type": "stat", "stat": "62%", "sub": "AI visibility \u00b7 \u201cbest crm\u201d \u201clead tools\u201d"}}, "brand_monitor": {"title": "Weekly brand monitor", "tag": "Marketing", "desc": "Tracks mentions and sentiment, emailed as a dashboard every week.", "uses": ["Reddit", "Semrush", "Firecrawl"], "output": {"type": "note", "note": "Emailed every Monday"}}, "tool_call_activity": {"title": "Tool call activity log", "tag": "Security & IT", "desc": "Every tool call is logged and tied to a specific user, agent, or service, with full traces.", "uses": ["Slack", "Salesforce", "HubSpot"], "output": {"type": "rows", "rows": [["Slack \u00b7 Get History", "Success"], ["Linear \u00b7 Create Issue", "Success"], ["Airtable \u00b7 Base Schema", "Error"]]}}, "chat_insights": {"title": "Chat to find insights", "tag": "Security & IT", "desc": "Ask questions in plain language to investigate AI activity across every MCP server.", "uses": ["Slack", "Salesforce", "HubSpot"], "output": {"type": "qa", "q": "Who called the delete tool this week?", "a": "2 calls by 1 user, both on staging."}}, "t_sales_call": {"title": "AI sales-call analysis agent", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Analyzes every Gong call and pushes the insights straight into your CRM and Slack.", "uses": ["Gong", "Salesforce", "Apollo"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/ai-sales-call-analysis-agent-gong-to-slack-integration"}, "t_sf_pipeline": {"title": "Salesforce pipeline updater", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Keeps opportunities, stages, and next steps current with no manual data entry.", "uses": ["Salesforce"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/salesforce-pipeline-updater"}, "t_cold_outreach": {"title": "AI cold outreach & CRM automation", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Enriches a lead, writes a personalized email, and tracks the reply end to end.", "uses": ["Gmail", "Apollo"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/ai-cold-outreach-crm-automation-lead-enrichment-personalized-email-reply-tracking"}, "t_research_report": {"title": "AI research agent", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Researches any topic and emails back a formatted, sourced report.", "uses": ["Gmail", "Perplexity"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/ai-research-agent-with-automated-report-generation"}, "t_li_content": {"title": "LinkedIn research & content creator", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Researches a prospect on LinkedIn and drafts tailored content to send.", "uses": ["LinkedIn", "Perplexity", "Slack"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/automated-ai-powered-linkedin-research-and-content-creator"}, "t_li_enrich": {"title": "LinkedIn contact enrichment", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Enriches LinkedIn contacts into HubSpot and pings the owner in Slack.", "uses": ["LinkedIn", "HubSpot", "Slack"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/linkedin-contact-enrichment-with-hubspot-and-slack-automated-workflow"}, "t_meeting_prep": {"title": "Agentic meeting prep", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Builds your pre-meeting brief and posts it to Slack before every call.", "uses": ["Slack"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/agentic-meeting-prep-flow"}, "t_data_analyst": {"title": "Data analyst agent", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Ask a question in plain language and get the answer back in Slack.", "uses": ["Slack"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/data-analyst-agent"}, "t_blog_seo": {"title": "Blog SEO audit & optimizer", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Audits a post against the top results and rewrites it to rank.", "uses": ["Semrush", "Firecrawl"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/blog-seo-audit-and-optimizer-agent"}, "t_gads": {"title": "Google Ads search analyst", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Analyzes paid-search performance and surfaces wasted spend.", "uses": ["Semrush"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/google-ads-search-analyst"}, "t_reddit_insights": {"title": "Reddit community analyzer", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Pulls the top posts in a subreddit and turns them into insights.", "uses": ["Reddit"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/analyze-top-posts-on-a-reddit-community-and-get-insights"}, "t_battle_card": {"title": "Sales battle-card builder", "tag": "Template", "desc": "Researches a prospect and drafts a ready-to-use competitive battle card.", "uses": ["Perplexity"], "link": "https://www.gumloop.com/templates/sales-battle-card-for-a-prospect"}, "g_shop_cart": {"title": "Abandoned-cart win-back", "tag": "Example", "desc": "Spots high-value abandoned carts and drafts a personalized win-back email.", "uses": ["Shopify", "Gmail"]}, "g_shop_digest": {"title": "Daily store sales digest", "tag": "Example", "desc": "Summarizes orders, revenue, and top products into a morning Slack post.", "uses": ["Shopify", "Slack"]}, "g_reddit_leads": {"title": "Reddit lead miner", "tag": "Example", "desc": "Finds people describing your problem in target subreddits, ready to reach out.", "uses": ["Reddit"]}, "g_fc_watcher": {"title": "Competitor page watcher", "tag": "Example", "desc": "Scrapes competitor pages and flags pricing or messaging changes.", "uses": ["Firecrawl"]}}, "tools": [["Salesforce", ["crm_updater", "t_sales_call", "t_sf_pipeline"]], ["Gong", ["crm_updater", "quote_digest", "t_sales_call"]], ["Gmail", ["quote_digest", "t_cold_outreach", "t_research_report"]], ["Apollo", ["personalized_lp", "t_sales_call", "t_cold_outreach"]], ["LinkedIn", ["personalized_lp", "t_li_content", "t_li_enrich"]], ["Slack", ["tool_call_activity", "t_meeting_prep", "t_data_analyst"]], ["HubSpot", ["t_li_enrich", "tool_call_activity", "chat_insights"]], ["Perplexity", ["aeo_agent", "t_li_content", "t_battle_card"]], ["Semrush", ["seo_decay", "t_blog_seo", "t_gads"]], ["Shopify", ["seo_decay", "g_shop_cart", "g_shop_digest"]], ["Reddit", ["brand_monitor", "t_reddit_insights", "g_reddit_leads"]], ["Firecrawl", ["brand_monitor", "t_blog_seo", "g_fc_watcher"]]], "proof": [["Instacart", "2x", "meetings / SDR"], ["Gusto", "$1.5M+", "new ARR"], ["Samsara", "$80K", "saved / year"], ["Shopify", "110+", "teams"]]};
</script>
  <script>
(function(){
  var D = window.PICNIC, L = D.logos;

  document.getElementById('imgClosed').src = D.closed;
  document.getElementById('imgOpen').src = D.open;

  // ---- orbit ----
  var orbit = document.getElementById('orbit');
  var svg = document.getElementById('orbitLines');
  var n = D.tools.length, R = 39;
  var SVGNS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  D.tools.forEach(function(t, i){
    var name = t[0], ids = t[1];
    var ang = (-90 + i*(360/n)) * Math.PI/180;
    var x = 50 + R*Math.cos(ang), y = 50 + R*Math.sin(ang);
    // line
    var ln = document.createElementNS(SVGNS,'line');
    ln.setAttribute('x1',50); ln.setAttribute('y1',50);
    ln.setAttribute('x2',x.toFixed(2)); ln.setAttribute('y2',y.toFixed(2));
    ln.setAttribute('data-idx', i);
    svg.appendChild(ln);
    // tile
    var tile = document.createElement('div');
    tile.className = 'orbit-tile' + (name === 'Salesforce' ? ' pulse-ring' : '');
    tile.style.left = x.toFixed(2)+'%';
    tile.style.top = y.toFixed(2)+'%';
    tile.setAttribute('tabindex','0');
    tile.setAttribute('role','button');
    tile.setAttribute('aria-label', name + ', see use cases');
    tile.innerHTML = '<img src="'+L[name]+'" alt="'+name+'"/><span class="tt-label">'+name+'</span>';
    function open(){ highlight(i); openModal(name, ids); }
    tile.addEventListener('click', open);
    tile.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); open(); }});
    tile.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(){ highlight(i); });
    tile.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(){ if(!modalOpen()) highlight(-1); });
    orbit.appendChild(tile);
  });
  function highlight(idx){
    svg.querySelectorAll('line').forEach(function(l){
      l.classList.toggle('on', parseInt(l.getAttribute('data-idx'),10)===idx);
    });
  }

  // ---- proof ----
  var pr = document.getElementById('proofRow');
  D.proof.forEach(function(p){
    var d = document.createElement('div'); d.className='proof-item';
    d.innerHTML = '<img src="'+L[p[0]]+'" alt="'+p[0]+'"/><span><span class="proof-v">'+p[1]+'</span> <span class="proof-l">'+p[2]+'</span></span>';
    pr.appendChild(d);
  });

  // ---- basket click to open (reveals the Gumloop story) ----
  var stage = document.getElementById('basketStage'), revealed=false;
  function openBasket(){
    if(revealed) return; revealed=true;
    stage.classList.add('is-open');
    ['toolsSection','howSection'].forEach(function(id,i){
      setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById(id).classList.add('shown'); }, 260 + i*160);
    });
    setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('toolsSection').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}); }, 620);
  }
  stage.addEventListener('click', openBasket);
  stage.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); openBasket(); }});

  // ---- scroll prompt jumps down to the Gumloop story ----
  var scrollPrompt = document.getElementById('scrollPrompt');
  if(scrollPrompt){
    scrollPrompt.addEventListener('click', function(){
      document.getElementById('story').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
    });
  }

  // ---- modal ----
  var overlay = document.getElementById('modalOverlay');
  var mHead = document.getElementById('modalHead'), mBody = document.getElementById('modalBody');
  function modalOpen(){ return overlay.classList.contains('open'); }

  function usesHtml(uses){
    return '<div class="uc-uses"><span class="lbl">Uses</span>'+
      uses.map(function(u){ return '<img src="'+L[u]+'" alt="'+u+'" title="'+u+'"/>'; }).join('')+'</div>';
  }
  function statusClass(v){
    var s=(''+v).toLowerCase();
    if(s==='success'||s==='active') return 'ok';
    if(s==='error') return 'err';
    if(s==='deploying'||s==='updated') return 'warn';
    return '';
  }
  function outputHtml(o){
    var h='<div class="uc-out"><div class="out-lbl">Output</div>';
    if(o.type==='rows') h+=o.rows.map(function(r){return '<div class="out-row"><span class="k">'+r[0]+'</span><span class="v '+statusClass(r[1])+'">'+r[1]+'</span></div>';}).join('');
    else if(o.type==='stat') h+='<div class="out-stat">'+o.stat+'</div><div class="k" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin-top:2px;">'+o.sub+'</div>';
    else if(o.type==='quotes') h+='<div class="k" style="font-size:11.5px;margin-bottom:4px;">To: '+o.to+'</div>'+o.quotes.map(function(q){return '<div class="out-quote">\u201c'+q+'\u201d</div>';}).join('');
    else if(o.type==='qa') h+='<div class="out-qa"><div class="q">'+o.q+'</div><div class="a">'+o.a+'</div></div>';
    else if(o.type==='cta') h+='<span class="out-cta"><i data-lucide="calendar-check"></i>'+o.label+'</span>';
    else if(o.type==='note') h+='<span class="out-note"><i data-lucide="mail"></i>'+o.note+'</span>';
    return h+'</div>';
  }
  function tagClass(tag){ return tag==='Template'?' tpl':(tag==='Example'?' ex':''); }
  function openModal(name, ids){
    mHead.innerHTML = '<img src="'+L[name]+'" alt="'+name+'"/>'+
      '<div><div class="mh-title">'+name+'</div><div class="mh-sub">Three things your team can build with '+name+' in the basket</div></div>';
    mBody.innerHTML = ids.map(function(id){
      var u = D.usecases[id];
      var extra = u.output ? outputHtml(u.output)
        : (u.link ? '<a class="uc-link" href="'+u.link+'" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View template <i data-lucide="arrow-up-right"></i></a>' : '');
      return '<div class="uc-card'+(u.output?'':' no-out')+'">'+
        '<div class="uc-top"><span class="uc-title">'+u.title+'</span><span class="uc-tag'+tagClass(u.tag)+'">'+u.tag+'</span></div>'+
        '<p class="uc-desc">'+u.desc+'</p>'+ usesHtml(u.uses)+ extra + '</div>';
    }).join('');
    overlay.classList.add('open'); overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
  }
  function closeModal(){ overlay.classList.remove('open'); overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); highlight(-1); }
  document.getElementById('modalClose').addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  overlay.addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===overlay) closeModal(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Escape') closeModal(); });

  // ---- form (direct webhook POST, no connector) ----
  var WEBHOOK_URL = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbwwPMF21KCXqJTPrGNwKoHL1QJLYiJ-OBtHaHFM-ZIoh7RzMLRogtNmoMSNmwG_Sk_giA/exec";
  var form = document.getElementById('basketForm');
  var status = document.getElementById('formStatus');
  var btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
  var EMAIL_RE = /^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$/;
  form.addEventListener('submit', function(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    status.className='form-status'; status.textContent='';
    var payload = {
      name: form.name.value.trim(),
      email: form.email.value.trim(),
      address: form.address.value.trim()
    };
    if(!payload.name || !payload.email || !payload.address){
      status.className='form-status err'; status.textContent='Please fill in every field.'; return;
    }
    if(!EMAIL_RE.test(payload.email)){
      status.className='form-status err'; status.textContent='Please enter a valid email address.'; return;
    }
    btn.disabled = true; btn.querySelector('.btn-label').textContent='Sending…';
    var done = false;
    function showDone(){
      if (done) return; done = true;
      form.innerHTML = '<div class="form-done"><i data-lucide="party-popper"></i>'+
        '<h3>Your picnic basket is on its way!</h3>'+
        '<p>More info from Gumloop and the shipping details will be sent ASAP.</p></div>';
      if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
    }
    // Only confirm AFTER the request settles — i.e. after the viewer approves the
    // sandbox "Allow" prompt and the request has actually gone out. no-cors means the
    // promise may resolve or reject either way; both mean it was dispatched, so we
    // confirm on settle. keepalive lets it finish even if the tab closes.
    fetch(WEBHOOK_URL, {
      method:'POST', mode:'no-cors', keepalive:true,
      headers:{'Content-Type':'text/plain;charset=UTF-8'},
      body: JSON.stringify(payload)
    }).then(showDone, showDone);
    // Safety net so the button never hangs on "Sending…" forever.
    setTimeout(showDone, 25000);
  });

  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
})();

</script>
</body>
</html>
